query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS categoryCodes (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  code VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  usefulLifeYears INT COMMENT 'Standard useful life for depreciation',
  depreciationRate DECIMAL(5,2) COMMENT 'Annual depreciation rate',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

INSERT INTO categoryCodes (code, name, usefulLifeYears, depreciationRate) VALUES
('CO', 'Computer', 3, 0.33),
('FF', 'Furniture & Fixtures', 10, 0.10),
('GE', 'Generator', 5, 0.20),
('LA', 'Land', NULL, 0.00),
('LB', 'Land & Building', 50, 0.02),
('ME', 'Medical Equipment', 5, 0.20),
('OE', 'Office Equipment', 5, 0.20),
('VE', 'Vehicle', 5, 0.20);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS subCategories (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  categoryType VARCHAR(20) COMMENT 'Asset or Inventory',
  parentCategory VARCHAR(100),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
